what: Read existing markdown file and parse frontmatter

output.console: Loaded entry details including frontmatter fields and content length

success_handling.criteria: Markdown file is read successfully and frontmatter is parsed into a structured object with content body separated

error_handling.criteria: The target markdown file does not exist at the expected vault path
error_handling.action: Abort edit, return error indicating the entry does not exist

error_handling.criteria: File exists but frontmatter YAML is malformed or cannot be parsed
error_handling.action: Attempt to load raw content, warn user about frontmatter issues, allow editing to fix

decisions.outcome: Proceed to validate-changes step with loaded data
Load raw content, allow user to fix during edit
